findings.summary: 409 ConflictException holder metadata stripped by global JsonExceptionFilter; client never receives lockedByUserId or lockExpiresAt
acquireLock 200 response is double-nested { lock: { pageId, lock: DocsLockState } } rather than AC1-specified { pageId, lock: DocsLockState }
softDeletePage performs lock check outside a transaction, creating a TOCTOU window unlike the other three write paths
Documentation claims 409 error body includes DocsLockConflictInfo under a lock key, which the JsonExceptionFilter strips
docs.module.ts edited outside stated allowed-file scope to register DOCS_CONFIG DI provider — necessary and minimal

findings.file: apps/api/src/auth/auth.controller.test.ts (and four other fixture test files)
findings.summary: Five out-of-scope test-fixture files edited to add docs.lockTtlMinutes: 30 — necessary due to ApplicationEnvironment type change

test_sufficiency_summary: Thorough unit test coverage for AC1-AC11. Gap: no HTTP-layer test exercises the JsonExceptionFilter; holder-metadata BLOCKING defect passes unit tests undetected.
documentation_accuracy_summary: Mostly accurate. INACCURATE: 409 body described as including DocsLockConflictInfo under lock key, but the global error filter strips this field.
